blocks.text: Cricket update: Relive England's thrilling 2017 World Cup win. Ahead of England facing Australia in the final of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup final, BBC Sport looks back at the last time England won a major tournament on home soil, when they beat India by nine runs at Lord's in the 50-over World Cup in 2017.
